suppress.notes: Embedded Tomcat managed by Spring Boot. No direct usage.
Spring Security used in stateless JWT REST API (no sessions, no form login). CVE relates to session-based authentication scenarios not used in this project.

Spring Boot / Spring Web CVE flagged by Dependency-Check. Application is stateless JWT REST API with no session-based authentication or form login. Vulnerable code paths are not applicable in this architecture.
Spring Boot 3.5.9 flagged by Dependency-Check due to CVE/CPE mapping. No known exploitable vulnerability in application context. Framework is used as managed dependency via Spring Boot BOM.
Spring Framework 6.2.15 flagged by Dependency-Check. Application uses stateless REST API with Spring Security JWT. No vulnerable usage patterns applicable.
